title: marrubium cuneatum var. spinulosum
intro: Marrubium cuneatum var. spinulosum, also known as the spike-leaved horehound, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Marrubium cuneatum var. spinulosum include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as soothing and calming effects on the skin. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
